word: H5464 - סַגְרִיד - çagrîyd - sag-reed' - Very rainy

sections.paragraph:
Original: סגריד

Transliteration: sagrı̂yd

Phonetic: sag-reed'

BDB Definition:

  1. steady or persistent rain

Origin: probably from H5462 in the sense of sweeping away

TWOT entry: 1463a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
